name: Garden Vegetable Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all vegetables and margarine in a 2-quart microwave-safe casserole dish.
2. Cover the dish and microwave on high for 9-10 minutes or until the vegetables are tender, stirring once during cooking.
3. Stir in milk, flour, bouillon, tomato, basil, and salt.
4. Microwave uncovered for another 9-10 minutes or until the mixture boils and thickens, stirring twice during this process.
